Description: The unique identifying coordinator name used to identify the different coordinators in reports.
The list of Node ID & Coordinator Event pairs to find the first node id that has the given **NodeProperty**.
The **NodeProperty** key:value pair that the node must have to get its event broadcasted.

Coordinator event to broadcast when a node with the given **NodeProperty** key:value pair is not found. The events contained in the list are defined in **Custom_Coordinator_Events** in the simulation configuration file.

If one of the coordinator events in this list is heard, the coordinator will start and attempt to send an event based on the selection of a node. The events contained in the list are defined in **Custom_Coordinator_Events** in the simulation configuration file.
